questions.question: What are the specific property maintenance requirements for residents regarding weeds?
questions.answer: Residents are required to maintain all developed areas of their premises that are intended for use by building occupants or the public free from weeds that exceed 10 inches in height. Additionally, noxious weeds are prohibited. (Section not numbered)

questions.question: Are there exceptions in the property maintenance code to allow for cultivated pollinator gardens?
Does the property maintenance law go beyond the property lot lines (such as to the curb)?
What are the penalties/fees for failing to comply with property maintenance regulations?
What is the timeline for resolving a property maintenance violation before penalties are applied?
